changes.from: Italy and its neighbor sign the Treaty of Rapallo
changes.to: Italy and the Kingdom of Serbs, Croats and Slovenes sign the Treaty of Rapallo
changes.issue: Draft's vague 'its neighbor' reads poorly and hides the named party; restored the actual signatory from the sentence (78 chars, within limit).

changes.from: Margaret Travers Symons speaks in the House of Commons
changes.to: Margaret Travers Symons is first woman to speak in the House of Commons
changes.issue: Draft dropped the notable main point (she was the FIRST woman to speak); restored it, still under 80 chars.

changes.from: Gotterdammerung closes the first Bayreuth Festival
changes.to: Götterdämmerung closes the first Bayreuth Festival
changes.issue: Restored accurate work-title spelling with umlauts (rule 3); sentence spells it Götterdämmerung.

changes.from: HMS Niobe arrives as the first Royal Canadian Navy ship
changes.to: HMS Niobe arrives as the first large Royal Canadian Navy ship
changes.issue: Restored 'large': sentence says first LARGE ship, not first ship of the RCN.
Reordered so '50 metres' reads as distance; original adjacency '14-bis 50 metres' read clunkily.

changes.from: Mackinder makes the first ascent of Mount Kenya's Batian
changes.to: Mackinder's party makes the first ascent of Mount Kenya's Batian
changes.issue: Sentence credits three climbers (Mackinder, Ollier, Brocherel); softened solo attribution to 'party' to stay faithful while keeping the named leader

changes.from: Massachusetts Bay Colony organizes its first militia regiments
changes.to: Massachusetts Bay Colony organizes three militia regiments
changes.issue: Draft's 'its first' invents a fact not in the sentence; the sentence says three regiments, not that they were the colony's first.

changes.from: A hoax alien broadcast interrupts Southern Television
changes.to: An 'Intergalactic Association' speaker interrupts Southern Television
changes.issue: Draft's 'hoax' and 'alien' assert an outcome/identity not stated in the sentence; kept the sentence's quoted 'Intergalactic Association' instead.

changes.from: The Balmis smallpox vaccination expedition departs A Coruna
changes.to: The Balmis smallpox vaccination expedition departs A Coruña
changes.issue: Restored correct place spelling 'A Coruña' (draft dropped the ñ); rule 3 requires accurate place names.

changes.from: Portugal acclaims Joao IV, ending the Iberian Union
changes.to: Portugal acclaims João IV, ending the Iberian Union
changes.issue: Restored correct spelling 'João IV' (draft dropped the ã); rule 3 requires accurate names.

changes.from: Thomas Paine publishes the first American Crisis
changes.to: Thomas Paine publishes the first American Crisis pamphlet
changes.issue: 'the first American Crisis' reads as first crisis; added 'pamphlet' to reflect it is the first in the series.

changes.from: Louis IX meets Mongol envoys en route to the Crusade
changes.to: Louis IX meets Mongol envoys en route to the Seventh Crusade
changes.issue: Sentence specifies the Seventh Crusade; named it for accuracy instead of generic 'the Crusade'.

diacritic_restorations.to: Belém is founded on the Amazon delta
Swiss Anabaptist Movement is founded in Zürich
Nojpetén, the last Maya capital, falls to Spain
Ming forces conquer Dai Ngu and capture Hồ Quý Ly
RTÉ admits undisclosed payments to Ryan Tubridy
Mozart's Die Entführung aus dem Serail premieres in Vienna
Schäffer's bid to seize Hawaii for Russia fails
The Niépce brothers patent the Pyréolophore engine
Raúl Alfonsín is elected president of Argentina
San José is founded as the first pueblo in Alta California

note: Second verify pass over the 405 write-only headlines flagged 12 edits (facts/clarity); a follow-up diacritic sweep restored 10 accented proper nouns/titles the write stage had ASCII-folded, for consistency with the summary text.
